phase_1_rationale: Candidate A fully refactors `NewIssueState` to initialize `ApiActorsSupported` inside the constructor (eliminating the redundant post-initialization block) and successfully simplifies redundant boolean expressions in `survey.go` as described in the PR notes.

phase_1_semantic_concerns.B: Candidate B alters the signature of `NewIssueState` to accept `apiActorsSupported` but fails to assign it to the newly constructed state struct, relying instead on a redundant post-initialization check. It also leaves redundant checks for `useReviewerSearch` and `useAssigneeSearch` in `survey.go`.
